seed_instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings.
new_constraint: Do not allocate any time for team meetings in the schedule.
instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. Allocate time for team meetings. Do not allocate any time for team meetings in the schedule.
response:
It seems there is a contradiction in your request: you asked to "allocate time for team meetings" and then immediately said "Do not allocate any time for team meetings." Based on the final instruction, I have created a one-week schedule that includes **only** coding and testing time, with **zero** time allocated for team meetings. ### One-Week Feature Development Schedule (Meetings Excluded) **Objective:** Complete and integrate the new app feature. **Total Duration:** 5 Days of focused development (Monday – Friday). | Day | Time Slot | Activity Description | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **Monday** | 09:00 – 17:00 | **Core Coding & Architecture**: Implementation of primary business logic and database schema updates for the new feature. | | **Tuesday** | 09:00 – 17:00 | **Frontend & UI Development**: Building user interfaces, API integrations, and ensuring responsive design. | | **Wednesday** | 09:00 – 12:00 | **Coding - Part 2**: Refinement of edge cases and secondary functionality.
**12:00 – 17:00** | **Unit Testing**: Writing and executing automated unit tests for all new code components. | | **Thursday** | 09:00 – 14:00 | **Integration Testing**: Connecting the new feature with existing app modules and end-to-end workflow verification.
**14:00 – 17:00** | **Debugging & Bug Fixing**: Resolving issues found during integration testing. | | **Friday** | 09:00 – 12:00 | **Performance Optimization**: Code review, refactoring, and performance tuning.
**12:00 – 15:00** | **Final QA & Deployment Prep**: Final manual checks by the team lead and preparing deployment scripts/docs.
**15:00 – 17:00** | **Documentation**: Updating technical docs and README files (No meetings). | **Note:** As requested, this schedule contains no blocks designated for stand-ups, sprint planning, retrospectives, or ad-hoc status meetings.<|im_end|>
final_answer:
It seems there is a contradiction in your request: you asked to "allocate time for team meetings" and then immediately said "Do not allocate any time for team meetings." **12:00 – 17:00** | **Unit Testing**: Writing and executing automated unit tests for all new code components. | | **Thursday** | 09:00 – 14:00 | **Integration Testing**: Connecting the new feature with existing app modules and end-to-end workflow verification.
**14:00 – 17:00** | **Debugging & Bug Fixing**: Resolving issues found during integration testing. | | **Friday** | 09:00 – 12:00 | **Performance Optimization**: Code review, refactoring, and performance tuning.
**12:00 – 15:00** | **Final QA & Deployment Prep**: Final manual checks by the team lead and preparing deployment scripts/docs.
**15:00 – 17:00** | **Documentation**: Updating technical docs and README files (No meetings). | **Note:** As requested, this schedule contains no blocks designated for stand-ups, sprint planning, retrospectives, or ad-hoc status meetings.<|im_end|>
